text: Open Source Intel BREAKING: 🔴 U.S. President Donald Trump said the war with Iran should end in days, not weeks, and warned that if no deal is reached he would “blow up the whole country,” with “very little” off the table, ABC News reports. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2040828176457195675/photo/1 tweet

Faytuks News Trump tells ABC that the Iran conflict should be over in days, not weeks. He adds that if no deal is reached he will "blow up the whole country [Iran]" with "very little" off the table. Spoke with President Trump. He told me the conflict should be over in days, not weeks but if no deal is made he’s blowing up the whole country with “very little” off the table. "If happens, it happens. And if it doesn't, we're blowing up the whole country,” he said. I asked if there’s anything off limits. “Very little,” he said. - Rachel Scott tweet

Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🚨 🇺🇸 🧑‍✈️ How did the U.S. Air Force crew member survive deep inside Iran? 🔹 According to The New York Times, the pilot (weapons systems officer) climbed to a ridge about 2,100 feet (≈640 meters) above sea level in mountainous terrain, equipped only with a pistol, a radio, and a locator beacon. 🎯 As the rescue operation began, U.S. fighter jets carried out airstrikes on Iranian military convoys to prevent them from approaching the area where the pilot was hiding. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet

Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could be reached by Tuesday, warning "I am blowing up everything" if no agreement is reached, Axios reports. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2040824173161845189/photo/1 tweet

↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to Fox News, U.S. Air Force assets maintained continuous protection over the downed pilot in Iran’s mountainous region, creating a defensive perimeter and responding immediately to any Iranian activity. ▪️ Enemy positions near the pilot were constantly targeted, with multiple platforms involved, including MQ-9 Reaper drones, F-35 fighters, and B-1 bombers. 🎯 🛡️ An MQ-9 reportedly eliminated an Iranian soldier who had approached within 3 km of the pilot’s location. 🔹 U.S. forces used sustained firepower to prevent Iranian units from approaching the rescue area at any time. 🟦 Fox News also reports that the CIA confirmed the identity of the F-15 crew member, raising concerns it could be a trap. ▪️ “Within 8 hours aircraft were airborne, and within about 12 hours we were already on the ground in Iran,” a senior official said. ▪️ The CIA conducted a deception operation, spreading false information about an air evacuation to draw Iranian forces away from the pilot’s location — a strategy officials say proved effective. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
Faytuks News Trump tells Axios that an Iran deal is possible by Tuesday, otherwise "I am blowing up everything" tweet

Open Source Intel Trump: "Open the Fuckin’ Strait, you crazy bastards, or you’ll be living in Hell". President Trump: “Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!! Open the Fuckin’ Strait, you crazy bastards, or you’ll be living in Hell - JUST WATCH! Praise be to Allah.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2040787032826355966/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
Asked if he is concerned the people of Iran, a country of 93 million people, could suffer if civilian infrastructure is hit, Trump said: No, they want us to do it. Source: WSJ

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios : U.S. President Trump said a deal with Iran could be reached as soon as Tuesday, otherwise “I am blowing up everything over there,” threatening power plants, bridges and oil wells. Indirect talks are ongoing through Pakistani, Egyptian and Turkish mediators. Separately, Trump revealed that U.S. forces initially feared a downed F‑15 crew member’s radio message (“God is good”) was an Iranian trap, but a special operations rescue succeeded. Israel conducted one strike to help. @wfwitness

Trump to WSJ on Iran: If they don’t come through… they’re going to lose every power plant and every other plant in the whole country. If they don’t do something by Tuesday evening, they won’t have any power plants and they won’t have any bridges standing. That country will take 20 years to rebuild, if they’re lucky. If they have a country.

According to him, the explosive material was manufactured in the United States. “We’ve been warning for months that something like this could happen. In this case, we had intelligence indicating that an individual from a migrant group, with military training, would attempt to carry out sabotage targeting gas infrastructure. The main obstacle we faced was a large amount of disinformation. This individual will definitely be apprehended. The explosive was produced in the U.S. The Serbian Army does not interfere in the political affairs of other countries.” The statement follows the discovery of approximately four kilograms of explosives near the international gas pipeline TurkStream gas pipeline. Via: @nultatacka 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Trump said Iran downed the jet with a shoulder-fired missile, adding, “They got lucky.” After the pilot transmitted “Power…" Trump to Axios: What he said on the radio sounded like something a Muslim would say.

Trump said the U.S. initially feared Iran was setting a trap after an F-15 crew member was shot down and sent an unusual radio message. Trump said Iran downed the jet with a shoulder-fired missile, adding, “They got lucky.” After the pilot transmitted “Power be to God” (officials say “God is good”), U.S. officials worried the signal might be fake and that Iran was “sending false signals” to lure them in. He described the search as intense, claiming “thousands of these savages were hunting him down.” Source: Axios

🇮🇷 An elderly Bakhtiari man, veteran of 10 months of combat in the Iran-Iraq war, describes the moment he opened fire on enemy aircraft with his rifle: "I saw two helicopters coming out from that village. Two fighter jets right above them. One circled back this way, I was already armed and ready." His wife told him not to shoot, thinking they were friendlies. He called the local Basij base to confirm. "Captain Jalil said: these are enemies — shoot, shoot, open fire!" Badassery. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

WarTranslated Lavrov spoke by phone with Iran’s foreign minister Abbas Araghchi, Russia’s Foreign Ministry says. They called for an end to what they described as reckless attacks on industrial and energy sites, including the Bushehr nuclear plant. Earlier today, Zelensky said Russia gave Iran intelligence on roughly 50 to 53 Israeli energy sites and helped it strike civilian infrastructure. tweet

OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump claimed in a several-minute-long phone interview this morning with Axios that the United States is “in deep and intense negotiations” with Iran and that a deal can be reached before his deadline expires on Tuesday. Trump stated, “The negotiations are going well, but you never get to the finish line with the Iranians,” adding that, “There is a good chance, but if they don't make a deal, I am blowing up everything over there.” tweet

WarTranslated Hungarian opposition candidate Peter Magyar accused Orban of staging the gas pipeline provocation with help from Serbia and Russia. He says the move was meant to fuel panic ahead of next week’s election. Orban claims explosives were found on the gas pipeline between Serbia and Hungary. He says an emergency defense council meeting has been called. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2040714695468896509/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet

WarTranslated Ukraine flatly rejects any link to the explosives incident near TurkStream in Serbia, Foreign Ministry spokesman Heorhii Tykhyi said. He says it was most likely a Russian false flag tied to Moscow’s interference in Hungary’s election. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2040815033391645064/photo/1 Hungary says the alleged sabotage attempt on the Serbian section of TurkStream was an attack on its sovereignty, since it gets most of its Russian fuel through that route, Peter Szijjarto says. - WarTranslated tweet
